# PatternFly 5 â†’ 6 Migration: Agent Evaluation Hints

This document provides domain knowledge for evaluating a PatternFly 5 to PatternFly 6
migration on the **quipucords-ui** codebase. The migration uses the official codemods:

```bash
npx @patternfly/pf-codemods --v6 --fix ./src
npx @patternfly/class-name-updater --v6 --fix ./src
```

## Package Version Requirements

All `@patternfly/*` packages must be updated to v6:

| Package | PF5 Version | Required PF6 Version |
|---------|-------------|---------------------|
| `@patternfly/patternfly` | 5.3.1 | ^6 |
| `@patternfly/react-core` | 5.3.4 | ^6 |
| `@patternfly/react-icons` | 5.3.2 | ^6 |
| `@patternfly/react-styles` | 5.3.1 | ^6 |
| `@patternfly/react-table` | 5.3.4 | ^6 |
| `@patternfly/react-tokens` | (used in code) | ^6 |

## Critical Breaking Changes

### 1. EmptyState Restructuring (HIGH IMPACT)

PF6 consolidates EmptyState into a simpler API. `EmptyStateHeader` and `EmptyStateIcon`
are **no longer exported as separate components**. The codemod may not fully handle this.

**Before (PF5):**
```tsx
import { EmptyState, EmptyStateHeader, EmptyStateIcon, EmptyStateBody, EmptyStateFooter } from '@patternfly/react-core';

<EmptyState variant="full">
  <EmptyStateHeader
    titleText="No data"
    icon={<EmptyStateIcon icon={CubesIcon} />}
    headingLevel="h4"
  />
  <EmptyStateBody>Description</EmptyStateBody>
  <EmptyStateFooter>
    <EmptyStateActions><Button>Action</Button></EmptyStateActions>
  </EmptyStateFooter>
</EmptyState>
```

**After (PF6):**
```tsx
import { EmptyState, EmptyStateBody, EmptyStateFooter, EmptyStateActions } from '@patternfly/react-core';

<EmptyState headingLevel="h4" titleText="No data" icon={CubesIcon} variant="lg">
  <EmptyStateBody>Description</EmptyStateBody>
  <EmptyStateFooter>
    <EmptyStateActions><Button>Action</Button></EmptyStateActions>
  </EmptyStateFooter>
</EmptyState>
```

**Older PF5 pattern (also in this codebase):**
```tsx
// This older pattern uses Title + EmptyStateIcon as direct children
<EmptyState variant={EmptyStateVariant.sm}>
  <EmptyStateIcon icon={ExclamationCircleIcon} />
  <Title headingLevel="h2" size="lg">Error</Title>
  <EmptyStateBody>Message</EmptyStateBody>
</EmptyState>
```
This must also be converted to the props-based API in PF6.

**EmptyStateVariant changes:**
- `EmptyStateVariant.full` â†’ removed, use `"lg"` or just remove variant
- `EmptyStateVariant.sm` â†’ `"sm"` (string literal works)
- The enum import `EmptyStateVariant` may still exist but `full` is removed

**Files affected in this codebase:**
- `src/components/errorMessage/errorMessage.tsx` â€” uses old pattern (Title + EmptyStateIcon children)
- `src/vendor/.../StateError.tsx` â€” uses old pattern with color prop on EmptyStateIcon
- `src/vendor/.../NoDataEmptyState.tsx` â€” uses old pattern
- `src/views/credentials/viewCredentialsList.tsx` â€” uses PF5 EmptyStateHeader pattern
- `src/views/sources/viewSourcesList.tsx` â€” uses PF5 EmptyStateHeader pattern
- `src/views/scans/viewScansList.tsx` â€” uses PF5 EmptyStateHeader pattern
- `src/views/scans/showScansModal.tsx` â€” uses PF5 EmptyStateHeader pattern
- `src/views/notFound/notFound.tsx` â€” uses PF5 EmptyStateHeader pattern

### 2. Modal Moved to Deprecated (HIGH IMPACT)

The existing `Modal` component is moved to `@patternfly/react-core/deprecated`.
A new Modal API is promoted from `/next`.

**What codemods do:** Move the import path to `/deprecated`.
**What codemods DON'T do:** Migrate to the new Modal API.

**Before (PF5):**
```tsx
import { Modal, ModalVariant } from '@patternfly/react-core';
```

**After codemod (minimum):**
```tsx
import { Modal, ModalVariant } from '@patternfly/react-core/deprecated';
```

**After full migration (ideal):**
```tsx
import { Modal, ModalBody, ModalFooter, ModalHeader } from '@patternfly/react-core';
// New Modal uses composition pattern with ModalBody, ModalHeader, ModalFooter children
```

**Files affected:**
- `src/views/credentials/viewCredentialsList.tsx` â€” 3 Modal instances
- `src/views/credentials/addCredentialModal.tsx`
- `src/views/sources/addSourceModal.tsx`
- `src/views/sources/addSourcesScanModal.tsx`
- `src/views/sources/showSourceConnectionsModal.tsx`
- `src/views/scans/showScansModal.tsx`
- `src/views/scans/showAggregateReportModal.tsx`

### 3. Text Components â†’ Content (HIGH IMPACT)

`TextContent`, `TextList`, and `TextListItem` are consolidated into a single `Content` component.

**Before (PF5):**
```tsx
import { TextContent, TextList, TextListItem } from '@patternfly/react-core';

<TextContent>
  <TextList component="dl">
    <TextListItem component="dt">Label</TextListItem>
    <TextListItem component="dd">Value</TextListItem>
  </TextList>
</TextContent>
```

**After (PF6):**
```tsx
import { Content } from '@patternfly/react-core';

<Content component="dl">
  <Content component="dt">Label</Content>
  <Content component="dd">Value</Content>
</Content>
```

**Files affected:**
- `src/components/aboutModal/aboutModal.tsx`

### 4. React Tokens Renamed (MEDIUM IMPACT)

PF6 design tokens use a `t_` prefix and completely new naming conventions.

| PF5 Token | PF6 Equivalent (approx.) |
|-----------|-------------------------|
| `global_Color_dark_100` | `t_global_text_color_regular` |
| `global_success_color_100` | `t_global_color_status_success_default` |
| `global_warning_color_100` | `t_global_color_status_warning_default` |
| `global_danger_color_100` | `t_global_color_status_danger_default` |
| `global_danger_color_200` | `t_global_color_status_danger_hover` (verify) |

**Codemods may mark tokens with no 1:1 match using a hot-pink placeholder (`t_temp_dev_tbd`).**

**Files affected:**
- `src/components/contextIcon/contextIcon.tsx` â€” imports 4 tokens
- `src/vendor/.../StateError.tsx` â€” imports `global_danger_color_200`

### 5. CSS Class Prefix pf-v5- â†’ pf-v6- (HIGH IMPACT)

All CSS classes using the `pf-v5-` prefix must be updated to `pf-v6-`.

**The `class-name-updater` codemod handles this** but may miss dynamically constructed class names.

**Files affected:**
- `src/components/viewLayout/viewLayoutToolbar.tsx` â€” `pf-v5-theme-dark` (dynamic), `pf-v5-c-avatar` (in JSX)
- `src/components/viewLayout/viewLayoutToolbar.css` â€” `.pf-v5-c-avatar`
- `src/views/sources/showSourceConnectionsModal.css` â€” `.pf-v5-c-table`
- `src/vendor/.../select-overrides.css` â€” `.pf-v5-c-select`
- `src/views/scans/showAggregateReportModal.tsx` â€” `pf-v5-u-mb-lg`
- Snapshot files (if present)

### 6. CSS Variables --pf-v5-* â†’ --pf-v6-* (HIGH IMPACT)

CSS custom properties using `--pf-v5-*` prefix must be updated.

**Files affected:**
- `src/components/viewLayout/viewLayoutToolbar.css` â€” `--pf-v5-global--spacer--sm`
- `src/views/sources/showSourceConnectionsModal.css` â€” `--pf-v5-c-table__expandable-row-content--PaddingTop`

### 7. PageSection Variant Changes

- `variant="light"` is removed; use `variant="default"` or omit it
- Dark variants removed

**Files affected:**
- `src/views/credentials/viewCredentialsList.tsx` â€” `variant="light"`
- `src/views/sources/viewSourcesList.tsx` â€” likely same
- `src/views/scans/viewScansList.tsx` â€” likely same

### 8. Deprecated Select Components

The old `Select`, `SelectOption`, `SelectOptionObject`, `SelectVariant` from
`@patternfly/react-core/deprecated` are **completely removed in PF6**. They were
already deprecated in PF5.

**Files affected:**
- `src/vendor/react-table-batteries/tackle2-ui-legacy/components/FilterToolbar/MultiselectFilterControl.tsx`
- `src/vendor/react-table-batteries/tackle2-ui-legacy/components/FilterToolbar/SelectFilterControl.tsx`
- `src/vendor/react-table-batteries/tackle2-ui-legacy/components/FilterToolbar/FilterToolbar.tsx`

## What Codemods Fix vs. What They Leave Behind

### Codemods WILL handle:
- Basic prop renames (e.g., `isActive` â†’ `isClicked` on Button)
- Moving deprecated component imports to `/deprecated` path
- Some EmptyState restructuring (but often incomplete)
- CSS class prefix updates (via class-name-updater)
- Simple component prop removals

### Codemods will NOT fully handle:
- **EmptyState full restructuring** â€” depends on implementation, manual updates often needed
- **React token renames** â€” tokens with no 1:1 mapping get placeholder values
- **Modal migration to new API** â€” only moves to deprecated path
- **Text â†’ Content migration** â€” may not handle TextList/TextListItem properly
- **CSS variable renames** â€” some have no direct PF6 equivalent
- **Deprecated Select â†’ new Select** â€” not handled, requires manual rewrite
- **Dynamic class name construction** â€” string concatenation with `pf-v5-` not caught
- **Snapshot test updates** â€” codemods don't touch test snapshots

## Common Migration Pitfalls

1. **EmptyStateIcon color prop**: In PF5, `<EmptyStateIcon icon={Icon} color={token.value} />` works.
   In PF6, pass the icon to `EmptyState` and handle color via CSS or the icon component's `color` prop directly.

2. **Modal actions prop**: PF5 Modal has `actions={[<Button>...</Button>]}`. New PF6 Modal uses
   `<ModalFooter>` children instead.

3. **Chip â†’ Label terminology**: All "chip" references in toolbar filter props become "label":
   `customChipGroupContent` â†’ `customLabelGroupContent`, `chips` â†’ `labels`, etc.

4. **Breakpoint values**: PF6 uses rem instead of pixels. `576px` â†’ `36rem`, `768px` â†’ `48rem`, etc.

5. **Nav tertiary variant**: `variant="tertiary"` â†’ `variant="horizontal-subnav"`.

6. **Build failures from unresolved imports**: If `EmptyStateHeader` or `EmptyStateIcon` are still
   imported from `@patternfly/react-core` after upgrading to v6 packages, the build will fail.

## Correct vs. Incorrect Migration Indicators

### âś… Correct migration:
- All `@patternfly/*` packages at v6 in `package.json`
- No imports of `EmptyStateHeader` or `EmptyStateIcon` from `@patternfly/react-core`
- EmptyState uses `titleText`, `headingLevel`, and `icon` props
- Modal either imported from `/deprecated` or migrated to new composition API
- `TextContent`/`TextList`/`TextListItem` replaced with `Content`
- CSS classes use `pf-v6-` prefix
- CSS variables use `--pf-v6-` prefix
- React tokens updated from `global_*` to `t_*` prefix
- `PageSection variant="light"` removed or changed to `variant="default"`

### âťŚ Incomplete migration:
- Mix of PF5 and PF6 package versions
- `EmptyStateHeader` still used as a JSX component
- `<EmptyStateIcon icon={...} />` still used as a child of EmptyState
- `<Title>` still used as a child of EmptyState
- `pf-v5-` CSS classes remaining in source (not just snapshots)
- `--pf-v5-` CSS variables remaining
- Old `global_*` token names still used
- `variant="light"` on PageSection
- `Modal` imported from `@patternfly/react-core` (not `/deprecated` or new API)
